MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY HEARING SET FOR JUL-25-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
OPPOSITION OF DEFT TO PLTFS MTN FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DAWSON, PAMLETTA
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-25-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 31, 2008 TO GIVE THE DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION TO PRESENT WHATEVER EVIDENCE SHE MIGHT HAVE AND NEEDS TO BE IN PROPER FORM. SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION TO BE FILED ON OR BEFORE JULY 29, 2008. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION OF DEFT PAMLETTA DAWSON TO PLTF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DAWSON, PAMLETTA
STATEMENT OF DEFT IN OPPOSITION TO PLTF'S STATEMENT OF UNDISPUTED FACTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DAWSON, PAMLETTA
DECLARATION OF DEFT PAMLETTA DAWSON IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DAWSON, PAMLETTA
DECLARATION OF TWIMA EARLEY IN SUPPORT OF PLTF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT (SECOND) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: CARELLA, JOHN F. SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR DAWSON, PAMLETTA
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-31-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION RAISES TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO HER SON'S RESIDENCY AND WHETHER SHE MADE THREATS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY CARELLA, JOHN F.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT
